resources.string: [Þäššŵöŕđ ŕëšëţ ŵîľľ ɓë äṽäîľäɓľë îñ ä ƒûţûŕë äþþ ûþđäţë.]
This sign-in link is invalid or has expired. Request a new one.
Could not send a magic link. Try again.
We will email you a one-time link that signs you in without a password.
If an account exists with that email, you will receive a sign-in link shortly.
[Çöüľđ ñöţ ŕëäçĥ ţĥë šëŕṽëŕ. Îš ţĥë ÄÞÎ ŕüññîñġ?]
Sign-in was cancelled. Try again when you\'re ready.
Single sign-on did not complete. Try again or use another method.
Your organization requires single sign-on. Use the button above.
[Ûšë ţĥë ëɱäîľ ÿöûŕ çöüŕšë öŕ šĉĥööľ ûšëš. ŠŠÖ öþţîöñš äþþëäŕ ŵĥëñ ÿöûŕ öŕġäñîžäţîöñ çöññëçţš ţĥëɱ.]
That code did not work. Try again.
Passkeys are not available on this device.
Add this account in your authenticator app, then enter the 6-digit code.
Your organization requires a second sign-in step. Add an authenticator app or passkey.
Enter the code from your authenticator app, use a passkey, or a backup code.
[Öñë äççöüñţ ƒöŕ çöüŕšëš, äššîġñɱëñţš, äñđ ɱëššäġëš.]
[Çĥööšë ţĥë läñġûäġë ƒöŕ ɱëñûš, ɓüţţöñš, äñđ öţĥëŕ îñţëŕƒäçë ţëẍţ.]
[Ÿöû đöñ’t ĥäṽë äñÿ äçţîṽë äççöɱɱöđäţîöñš ŕîğĥţ ñöŵ. Îƒ ÿöû ëẋþëçţ öñë, çöñţäçţ ÿöûŕ îñšţîţûţîöñ.]
[Ţĥëšë äþþŕöṽëđ šûþþöŕţš äŕë äþþľîëđ äûţöɱäţîçäľľÿ. Çöñţäçţ ÿöûŕ îñšţîţûţîöñ ţö ɱäķë çĥäñğëš.]
Ţũŕŉ öñ åţţéñðåñçé îñ çöûŕšé šéţţîñĝš ţö ûšé ŕöļļ çåļļ åñð šéļƒ-ŕéþöŕţ çĥéçķ-îñš.
Start a roll call for today, then mark the roster.
No students enrolled for this session scope.
[Ÿöûŕ šëššîöñ ŵäš šîġñëđ öûţ ŕëḿöţëľÿ. Šîġñ îñ äġäîñ ţö çöñţîñüë.]
[Ûšë %1$s öŕ ýöûŕ ðëṽîçë päššçöðë ţö çöñţîñüë.]
[Ŕëqüîŕë ḅîöḿëţŕîçš äƒţëŕ öñë ḿîñüţë îñ ţĥë ḅäçķġŕöüñđ.]
[Çöüŕšëš ÿöü ëñŕöľľ îñ ŵîľľ šĥöŵ ûþ ĥëŕë.]
[Çöüŕšëš ÿöü ëñŕöľľ îñ ŵîľľ šĥöŵ ûþ ĥëŕë.]
[Þäšţë äñ ĥţţþš ľîñķ ţö ä šǫûäŕë îɱäğë.]
[Çöûľđñ’t šäṽë ÿöûŕ çĥäñğëš. Þľëäšë ţŕÿ äğäîñ.]
[Downloaded course files will be removed from this device. You can download them again when online.]
[Preview is not available for this file type. Download it or open in another app.]
[Files uploaded to this course will appear here.]
[This file is not available offline. Download it while connected.]
Parent dashboard views are coming in a future update.
Secondary destinations will appear here when they apply to your role.
This destination is coming in a future update.
Search is coming in a future update. You can still find courses from the Courses tab.
When you have courses to teach, grading backlog and shortcuts appear here.
[Could not record usage, but you can still open the resource.]
[Catalog matches show bibliographic details. Your instructor adds licensed course readings to the course Library section.]
[This catalog item requires library authentication. Use Open on web to access it through your institution.]
[E-reserve and library readings assigned to this course will appear here.]
[This resource works best on a larger screen or in your browser.]
[This Leganto reading list must be opened through your library portal. Use Open on web for the full experience.]
[This resource is not available to open on mobile yet. Try Open on web or contact your instructor.]
[Try a different search term or check spelling.]
[This library resource could not be found.]
[This resource is ready to open. Usage is recorded for licensing reports.]
[Search failed. Try again when you are online.]
[Search the library catalog or OER providers to discover readings and openly licensed content.]
[Modules and assignments will appear here once published.]
[This activity is still being prepared. Try again in a few minutes.]
[Complete the required items to unlock this.]
[Course file preview is coming soon. Browse files on the web for now.]
[Interactive content opens in a future app update. Use the web app for now.]
[Quiz taking is coming soon in the mobile app. Open this course on the web to take the quiz.]
[This item type is not supported in the mobile app yet.]
[Opens the next activity you need to finish]
[Course activity and updates will appear here.]
[Choose which events send push and email notifications.]
[Öþţîöñäľ — šĥäŕë ŵĥäţ ÿöû ŵäñţ ţö đîšçûšš.]
[Ţĥäţ šľöţ ŵäš ĵûšţ ƀööķëđ. Þîçķ äñöţĥëŕ ţîɱë.]
[Çĥëçķ ƀäçķ ŵĥëñ ÿöûŕ îñšţŕûçţöŕ þûƀľîšĥëš äṽäîľäƀîľîţÿ.]
[ƀööķ ä šľöţ ƒŕöɱ ţĥë Äṽäîľäƀľë ţäƀ.]
[Ýöüŕ ðäšħβöäŕð îš þëršöñäľîẑëð ƒŕöɱ ðäý öñë.]
[Fîṽë šĥöŕţ qüëšţîöñš ħëľþ üš šüġġëţţ ţħë ŕîġħţ šţäŕţîñġ çöüŕšë.]
[ë.ġ. Ï ŵäñţ ţö ļëäŕñ Þýţħöñ βý Ĵüľý]
[Þîçķ ä ţöþîç äñð ðëšçŕîβë ýöüŕ ġöäľ.]
[Ŀëţ\'š þëršöñäľîžë ýöüŕ ļëäŕñîñġ þäţħ îñ åβöûţ fîṽë ɱîñüţëš.]
All fields are optional. Choose "Prefer not to say" to leave a field blank.
Choose one of the listed options.
Optional demographic information and organization-specific profile fields.
Native Hawaiian or Other Pacific Islander
Couldn\'t update your consent. Please try again.
How your data will be used
Review research studies you may join and manage your consent decisions.
Couldn\'t save your details. Please try again.
This adaptive quiz is best taken on the web for now.
Note the file name or link (full upload on web).
This attempt was flagged for review.
This quiz has no questions yet.
Not yet saved — will sync when online
Open this course on the web to answer this question type.
Some answers need manual grading. Check back later.
Open a course to take roll
Removes recent searches and destinations stored on this device.
No matches for \'%1$s\'. Try different keywords or open a tab from Actions.
You are offline. Recent searches are shown; new results need a connection.
[Ţĥëšë ðëṽîçëš äñð ḅŕöŵšëŕš çäñ äççëšš ýöûŕ äççöüñţ.]
[Šëë ŵĥëŕë ýöü\'ŕë šîġñëđ îñ äñð šîġñ öûţ ļöšţ ðëṽîçëš.]
[Çĥööšë ĥöŵ Ľëẋţûŕëš ľööķš öñ ţĥîš đëṽîçë.]
[Some parts of this activity work best on a larger screen. Open it in your browser to use every feature.]
[Vibe activities are available on the web app for now.]
